title: Add dark mode support
description: Implement a system-wide dark mode toggle, including updated color palettes and dynamic theme switching. Ensure all UI components adapt automatically.

title: Fix login timeout
description: Resolve an issue where session timeouts were not being enforced correctly, leading to users being logged out prematurely or not at all. Adjust token expiration handling.

title: Improve API rate limiting
description: Refine rate limit algorithms to handle burst traffic gracefully while preventing abuse. Add per-endpoint configuration options.
